summary: Plan-mode inventory shard classified the five open PRs independently. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive refs were found, and no close/merge/fix actions are recommended under the job gates.

actions.reason: Useful standalone feature PR with review/author follow-up remaining; not a duplicate, superseded PR, low-signal PR, or close candidate in this inventory shard.
Standalone channel bug-fix PR with unresolved proof/review gates; failing proof blocks merge/fixed-by-candidate closeout but does not justify closure.
Narrow standalone PR linked to a closed context issue, but current proof/check failures and disabled low-signal closeout mean no close or merge action is safe.
Standalone feature PR requiring real behavior proof and product/maintainer review before any merge path; not a duplicate, superseded, or low-signal close candidate.
Promising standalone performance PR with green proof/checks, but this plan job cannot merge and no close action applies.
